div.div: Entities assumed in the original ask but NOT present as separate tables

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1558px; height: 1px; padding-top: 692px; margin-left: 122px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
• Widget — apps/widget is a static Vite/IIFE bundle, not a DB-backed resource. A "widget" is really a Project's public submission endpoint, identified by Project.apiKey + domain whitelist.
• FeedbackAnalysis — AI results (sentimentScore, category, aiSummary, tags) are columns directly on Feedback, written by AiProcessor after the Gemini call (see Request Lifecycle tab) — no separate table.
• Subscription — billing/plan fields (plan, planStatus, planUpdatedAt, stripeCustomerId, stripeSubscriptionId, stripePriceId, trialEndsAt, lastStripeEventAt) are columns directly on Team (moved from User 2026-07-05, migration 1774910000000-TeamAsTenant). Billing is per-team (the tenant), not per-user or per-project.
• API Key — two distinct concepts exist as plain columns, not a table: User.apiKey (nullable, unique — user-level) and Project.apiKey (unique, required — used by the widget to authenticate public feedback submissions).

a.text: Text is not SVG - cannot display
